title: helianthemum × pulverulentum
intro: Helianthemum × pulverulentum, also known as rockrose or powdered rockrose, is a hybrid plant species within the Cistaceae family. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, thanks to its ability to promote tissue repair and reduce inflammation. Helianthemum × pulverulentum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies.
